Summary Capability (simple): Give immediate account context before any decision.
Expected Outcome (what we want to get): CSM understands who the customer is in 10 seconds.
Snapshot UX (what should be visible): Top identity block: account name, industry, country, short company summary.
Signals to connect (high level): Salesforce account profile + lightweight web/company description.
Louise input (plain language):
- Company Overview & Business Context
- Industry, size, regions (ie Global, UK based, EMEA ect) 
- High-level summary of what matters most to this customer (One line how they operate through Bob)
- Strategic Developments & Direction

Summary Capability (simple): Bring a tiny "outside-in" snapshot: who the company is and what recently changed externally.
Expected Outcome (what we want to get): CSM gets credible company context beyond CRM without digging on Google / LinkdeIn
Snapshot UX (what should be visible): 2–5 lines: plain-language company snapshot + optional 1-line "recent signal" hint (news/funding/move) when found.
Light Logic (only if needed): No heavy logic—default to short description; only show deeper signals when confidence/simple rules pass.
Signals to connect (high level): Public web summaries (company site / trusted news)—no login sites; respect policy limits.
Louise input (plain language):
[Louise: what must never appear vs must always appear—for exec-safe tone]

- Key topics that would be most impactful: Acquisitions, Layoffs, Leadership change, Funding (IPO Readiness)

Summary Capability (simple): Show commercial posture and renewal readiness.
Expected Outcome (what we want to get): CSM knows if this is expansion, neutral, or renewal-risk conversation.
Snapshot UX (what should be visible): ARR, segment, renewal date/quarter, owner block, simple commercial status line.
Light Logic (only if needed): If renewal is close, surface a renewal attention cue.
Signals to connect (high level): ARR, segment, renewal timing, account ownership.
Louise input (plain language):
Snapshot looks good here
- Contract Period? (Eg Snapshot 1 Jan 2023 - 1 Jan 2027) 
- In Commercial Overview it would be helpful to include if tiers (if you can get this), at what number 
EG Tier 1 1,000 - 3,000 EEs 5 PEPM, Tier 2 3,001 - 5,000 4 PEPM
Commercial Conditions Contractors / Blue Collar, Billing Groups per module - This will help give a clearer picture 
IE T&A PT, UK, ES

Summary Capability (simple): Show adoption and growth momentum clearly & potential upsells
Expected Outcome (what we want to get): CSM sees if the account is growing and where to focus value conversation.
Snapshot UX (what should be visible): Adoption snapshot, active users trend signal, key growth opportunities line.
Light Logic (only if needed): If adoption is low or dropping, flag as value-risk.
Signals to connect (high level): Active users, quoted employees, module usage, growth by site (when available).
Louise input (plain language):
- Adoption by module breakdown
- Upsell Opportunities & ARR (Value Linked per module) 
Events Timeline - Comp Launch, Performance ect

Summary Capability (simple): Connect risk indicators into one action-oriented view
Expected Outcome (what we want to get): CSM understands risk level, business impact, and who needs to be involved next.
Snapshot UX (what should be visible): Single risk strip: severity, short reason, ARR impact, latest mitigation actions.
Light Logic (only if needed): If risk is high/critical, prioritize risk panel and show mitigation owner.
Signals to connect (high level): Risk severity + risk reason + ARR impact + related SA interactions / support signals.
Louise input (plain language):
- Snapshot looks good here 
- Competitor Evaluation Stage 
- If Possible to link Related support tickets (Eg - UKP Tickets logged CFIT's escalated)

Summary Capability (simple): Keep the latest customer narrative visible.
Expected Outcome (what we want to get): CSM knows what happened recently and what was committed.
Snapshot UX (what should be visible): Last key touchpoints with date, short summary, and next step owner.
Light Logic (only if needed): Show recent items first; if no recent interaction, show clear missing-data prompt.
Signals to connect (high level): Gong calls, key emails, meeting notes.
Louise input (plain language):
- Latest Business Updates and Startegic Summary
Stakeholder Updates Attendee visibility (& Title) 
- Challenges, Module Focus Areas, Adoption Gaps 
Collaboration & Next Steps
